'''''Inquisitor-4''''' was a [[World Devastator]].

==Characteristics==
It was not as powerful or big as ''[[Silencer-7]]'', and would have been a secondary ship in a fleet similar to the one that attacked [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. However, it was capable of leading an attack on a less-defended world.
